## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategies for generating high-quality comparison articles efficiently for HockeyStack's urgent publishing needs.](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marisol uses a custom prompt-based approach with the agentic pipeline for comparison articles, focusing on robust assignment briefs and post-editing techniques](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Key steps: reverse-engineer competitor structures, use custom GPTs for prompt optimization, and apply post-editing prompts for polish and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Emphasis on avoiding content cannibalization and ensuring technical accuracy through regular changelog updates and validation prompts](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Topics

### Comparison Article Generation Process

  - [Marisol uses agentic article generation with focus on detailed assignment briefs](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Custom prompt created for comparison/listicle articles, including:](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)
      - [Product features](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [Voice and tone](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Content structure (main sections, conclusions)](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [Content strategy (TOFU, MOFU, BOFU)](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [SEO and keyword usage](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [Quality checklist](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Process involves reverse-engineering competitor articles for optimal structure](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Uses custom GPT (Context Engineering Applied) to optimize prompts under 600 tokens](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Generates \~30 articles per week, prioritizing speed and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Assignment Creation and Optimization

  - [Uses Atlas for assignment generation with custom prompts](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Adapts assignment direction based on article type (listicle, comparison, how-to)](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Optimizes assignment briefs by removing unnecessary sections (e.g., hypothetical use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Tailors content for senior developer audience, avoiding basic explanations](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

### Post-Editing and Refinement

  - [Applies post-editing prompts for analysis and improvement suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Uses Claude AI for technical validation and alignment with writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Implements a "polishing prompt" for SEO optimization and readability](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Applies Paul Graham-inspired style for more human-like, concise paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

### Content Cannibalization Prevention

  - [Weekly download of published articles to compare with upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Uses LLM to identify potential duplicates or articles that should be combined](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Generates diverse comparison topics using AI-suggested competitor combinations](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)

### Technical Accuracy and Product Updates

  - [Custom prompt for technical validation of Augment Code features](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Automated weekly changelog updates to maintain current product information](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Aims to integrate changelog data into Atlas pipeline for up-to-date product features](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kavishka to implement detailed assignment direction prompts in the agentic pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Consider reverse-engineering competitor comparison articles for improved content structure](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [Explore integration of automated changelog updates into the Atlas pipeline for better product accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/VYzxNVmVXpEQ2y6V7znAt_vpGPRVY3pw?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
